calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-10-2020 Discharged

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Nov-01-2019 Continued To Feb-10-20 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-20-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.
No appearance by Appellant Sally Liu
Respondent, Cris Youssef present in pro per.
Respondent stipulated to the hearing by a judge pro-tem., and is sworn.
Respondent testifies on his own behalf, and responds to the questions from the Court with documentary evidence introduced.
At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission.
No additional evidence is retained by the Court.
JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID H.S. COMMINS. Clerk S. Ravinantapricha. Not reported. (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-12-2018 Judgment Entered
